subject: [RFC v2 17/21] selftests/mm: add THP PMD split test infrastructure

2026-02-26.patch_summary: This patch series proposes to add a test infrastructure for verifying the behavior of Transparent Huge Pages (THP) PMD splitting, specifically when using lazy PTE allocation. The test includes a fixture with PMD-aligned memory allocation, helper functions for reading vmstat counters, and a macro for logging and checking if the THP split has occurred.
